name: compaction-advisor
description: Advice-only nudge to run /compact when a session grows long. A UserPromptSubmit hook counts user turns per session and, on a repeating 50-turn interval, prints one line suggesting /compact if an early chunk is no longer relevant to the current task — the model judges relevance from the nudge text. Resets on SessionStart source=compact|clear so it never nags right after a compaction or a context clear. Single self-healing state file per working tree, warn-only and fail-open: any error exits 0 silently, a corrupt or foreign-session state file re-seeds rather than going silent. No token API, no byte-size thresholds, and it never runs /compact itself — the user decides.
